productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Brown Shirts
description: CompositionBrown shirt made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket that has a check inner, stitch detailing, pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on decorationThis easy-to-wear shirt from United Colours of Benetton adds a touch of fun and playfulness to your wardrobe. Show off your fun side with this classy piece and revel in the soft comfort of the fabric. Pair it with interesting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
